title: cephalanthera damasonium
intro: Cephalanthera damasonium, also known as the summer lady's-tresses, is a species of orchid native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is a perennial plant that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cephalanthera damasonium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cephalanthera damasonium are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
